description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build & publish PyPI packages that triggers on push of tags matching v[0-9]+.** and on workflow dispatch. The workflow should have three jobs: Make SDist, upload to test PyPI, and upload to PyPI. The Make SDist job should run on multiple OS environments, set up Miniconda, build a source distribution, and upload the artifact. The other two jobs should download the artifact and upload it to test PyPI and PyPI respectively, using provided API tokens.
